Text-to-Speech

Listen to Text, PDFs, and Docs Anywhere

Turn text into natural-sounding speech in seconds. Import files, scan text from photos, and listen on the go with customizable voices.

Download on App Store

Everything you need to hear text clearly

🔊

Natural AI Voices

Choose from realistic voices with smooth playback for books, articles, notes, and documents.

📄

Import Any Content

Read text aloud from PDF, DOC, TXT, and more, or paste text directly from websites and apps.

📸

Photo to Speech (OCR)

Scan printed pages or screenshots and instantly convert recognized text into clear audio.

⚙️

Full Playback Control

Adjust speed and pitch, follow highlighted text with auto-scroll, and listen comfortably at your pace.

3 simple ways to start listening

📝

Type or Paste Text

Paste any text and play it instantly with your preferred voice and listening speed.

📂

Import Files

Upload PDFs, docs, and text files to convert long reads into audio in seconds.

📷

Scan from Photo

Use OCR to capture text from photos and listen hands-free while moving or multitasking.

Download free and turn reading into audio anywhere.
